data_sources.scoring_method: Rolling 252-day Z-score, equal-weighted 5 components per market

us_agent.narrative: SPY slipped to $668.95 with RSI at 32.9 — firmly in oversold territory now. VIX at 23.22 is elevated but not panicking. Gold at $4,858 continues its safe-haven bid. The 10Y yield at 4.22% means no rate cut relief. Score of 32.4 is in the fear zone — historically these levels see 73%+ positive forward returns over 20 days.
key_factors: RSI 32.9 near oversold threshold (30) — tactical bounce territory
SPY below both SMA20 ($679.3) and SMA60 ($685.6) — downtrend intact
us_agent.what_quant_misses: Market is approaching the 30 RSI level where systematic mean-reversion strategies often trigger. The VIX term structure and credit spreads matter more than spot VIX at these levels.
us_agent.forward_outlook: SPY likely to see a bounce attempt from oversold conditions. Historical win rate at Moodring ~32 is strong (>70% positive 20d). Key resistance: SMA20 at $679. If VIX spikes above 30, expect acceleration of the fear trade before reversal.

tw_agent.narrative: 外資連2天買超，今天淨買+90.2億，但大盤已經反彈到34,349了。台積電回到1,905。融資餘額月增0.0%，散戶信心還在。TAIEX RSI回到正常區間，外資方向翻轉是最大的正面信號。
key_factors: 外資連2天買超 — 方向翻轉是關鍵信號
融資月增0.0% — 散戶信心仍在
tw_agent.what_quant_misses: 外資轉買的連續性比單日金額更重要。如果能連買5天以上，通常代表外資策略性布局而非短期避險。
tw_agent.forward_outlook: 外資轉買+大盤技術面好轉，短期偏多看待。但全球不確定性仍高，反彈幅度可能有限。關注外資買超是否持續。

summary.cross_market_view: US仍偏恐懼(31.5)但TW今天明顯回溫(44.2)，分歧擴大到12.7。外資在台股翻多但美股仍處技術性弱勢，形成短期分歧。歷史上US偏恐懼+TW中性的組合通常意味著全球風險還在，但亞洲市場可能領先反彈。
summary.actionable_signal: HOLD — US接近超賣但未確認反轉。TW外資翻多是正面信號但需確認持續性(連買3天+)。不急進場，等確認信號。

jp_agent.narrative: Nikkei at 55,239 with RSI 37.6. Score 58.6 is mid-range — neither fearful nor greedy. JPY at 159.5 remains weak which supports exporters but signals global risk appetite concerns.
jp_agent.what_quant_misses: BOJ policy expectations and yen carry trade dynamics are the dominant factor for Japanese equities right now.
jp_agent.forward_outlook: Neutral outlook. Nikkei likely range-bound unless US provides directional catalyst.

kr_agent.narrative: KOSPI at 5,925 with strong 5d return of +5.6%. Score 78.0 is in greedy territory — historically these levels see mean-reversion risk. RSI 47.5 is neutral but momentum is strong.
key_factors: Score 78.0 in greedy zone — caution warranted
kr_agent.what_quant_misses: Samsung/SK Hynix memory cycle and geopolitical risk premium are Korea-specific factors that z-scores don't capture.
kr_agent.forward_outlook: Score 78 is historically where returns start to deteriorate. Contrarian signal suggests caution on new long positions.

eu_agent.narrative: STOXX50 at 5,752 with RSI 29.9 near oversold. 20d return -5.8% is the worst among all markets. Score 50.4 is dead center — no strong signal either way.
eu_agent.what_quant_misses: ECB rate path and Ukraine situation create asymmetric risk that pure technical indicators don't reflect.
eu_agent.forward_outlook: Oversold RSI may trigger a bounce but the fundamental backdrop is weak. Wait for score to drop below 40 for a stronger contrarian signal.

global_narrative: Global markets diverge sharply: US (32.4) and EU (50.4) in fear/neutral while Korea (78.0) is greedy. US RSI at 32.9 and EU RSI at 29.9 both near oversold. Cross-market divergence suggests regional rotation rather than global risk-off. Best contrarian opportunity: US at score 32 with strong historical win rates.
